Required for Power Save Mode 3 and 4 (Wa: Required for Power Save Mode 3 and 4 (Wake-on-LAN enabled).
Subnet broadcast address for WOL packets: Subnet broadcast address for WOL packets. If empty, derived from host IP (e.g. 192.168.1.100 to 192.168.1.255).
Mode 1: WOL off, source input wake off (: Mode 1: WOL off, source input wake off (cannot wake via network)
Mode 2: WOL off, source input wake on (w: Mode 2: WOL off, source input wake on (wakes on source signal only)
Mode 3: WOL on, source input wake off (r: Mode 3: WOL on, source input wake off (requires MAC address)
Mode 4: WOL on, source input wake on (re: Mode 4: WOL on, source input wake on (recommended, requires MAC address)
Must match the Power Save mode on your d: Must match the Power Save mode on your display. Mode 1/2: WOL disabled, no network wake. Mode 3/4: WOL enabled, requires MAC address.
